output: All routes return correct status codes and response shapes. Stripe webhook excluded (requires live Stripe signature).

tests.name: POST /api/eligibility
steps: HTTP Trigger: POST /api/eligibility { walletAddress, poolAddress, verificationType: 1, formData: { fullName, dateOfBirth, idNumber } }
Assert: proofHash is SHA-256 of { walletAddress, verificationType, ...formData }
HTTP Trigger: POST /api/eligibility { walletAddress: 'not-an-address', poolAddress, verificationType: 0, formData: {} }
HTTP Trigger: POST /api/eligibility — verificationType: 0 (none) with empty formData
Assert: 200 returned with valid proofHash for no-verification pools
EVM Write: EligibilityRegistry.storeProof verified via getProof call

tests.name: POST /api/ai-chat
steps: HTTP Trigger: POST /api/ai-chat { prompt: 'When does this pool trigger?', context: 'BTC price pool, threshold 50000, comparison GT' }
Assert: response contains text field (non-empty string)
Assert: text mentions BTC or price or threshold (context injected)
HTTP Trigger: POST /api/ai-chat { prompt: '', context: 'pool context' }
HTTP Trigger: POST /api/ai-chat — Claude Service health check
Assert: Claude Service reachable at CLAUDE_SERVICE_URL

tests.name: POST /api/activate-pool
steps: Assert: poolAddress is valid EVM address
EVM Read: InsurancePool.getPoolData() — state is ACTIVE

tests.name: POST /api/stripe-payment
steps: Assert: response contains clientSecret (string starting with pi_)
Assert: clientSecret is valid Stripe PaymentIntent client secret format
Assert: 400 status for invalid wallet address

tests.name: POST /api/test-source
steps: Assert: response contains value (number) and timestamp (ISO string)
Assert: 200 status with numeric temperature value
